creator: douglas@douglasthrift.net
text:
Huh? Don't know why it decided I wasn't the maintainer and then emailed
me since I was the maintainer.
-- 
Douglas William Thrift
<douglas@douglasthrift.net>
<http://douglasthrift.net/>

On 4/21/2012 2:30 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/py-keyring,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/167178 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/167178
>
